Portfolio

GitHub Projects

Manual QA — Documentation Library
📋
Manual QA · Featured
manual-testing-library
A complete production-ready manual QA documentation suite — every artifact a Senior QA Engineer produces across the full testing lifecycle. Refined over 5 years across 18 industries.
🐛 Bug Reports
Severity-classified defect reports with steps, environment, screenshots, and expected vs actual results.
📝 Test Plans
Strategy docs covering scope, objectives, approach, schedule, resources, risks, and exit criteria.
📐 Test Cases
Structured sheets with preconditions, steps, expected results, priority, and requirement traceability.
📌 Requirement Docs
User story analysis, acceptance criteria review, testability gaps, and edge case identification.
🔗 RTM
Requirements Traceability Matrix mapping every requirement to test cases for complete coverage.
✅ Checklists
Smoke, regression, cross-browser, UI/UX review, and release readiness gate checklists.
📊 Test Reports
Sprint and release QA reports with pass/fail metrics, defect density, and go/no-go decisions.
🔍 Exploratory Charters
Session-based charters with mission, time-box, risk areas, and structured observation notes.
🚦 UAT Sign-off
UAT plans, tester assignments, acceptance criteria, and formal client approval records.
🗃️ Test Data Docs
Valid/invalid inputs, boundary values, equivalence partitions, and edge case data sets.
🏁 Closure Reports
Closure docs with total effort, defect lifecycle, lessons learned, and handover risk items.
📈 QA Metrics Dashboard
Sprint quality metrics: detection rate, execution progress, escaped bugs, regression stability.
